walnut-cake.name: Walnut Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Butter a 13x9x2" metal or glass baking dish; sprinkle bottom evenly with 3 Tbsp. raw sugar. Set aside.

Pulse walnuts in a food processor until coarsely chopped. Set 2 cups aside. Add all-purpose flour to processor and pulse until walnuts are very finely ground, 1–2 minutes. Add almond flour; pulse to blend. Set aside.

Using an electric mixer, beat 1 cup butter and granulated sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 2–3 minutes. Add eggs, cream, yogurt, and salt. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean (reserve bean for another use). Beat until well combined, 1–2 minutes. Add ground-walnut mixture and beat just to blend. Gently fold in chopped walnuts, being careful not to overmix. Pour batter into prepared dish; smooth top. Sprinkle with remaining 3 Tbsp. raw sugar.

Bake until cooked through and a tester inserted into center comes out clean, 50–55 minutes. Let cool in pan on a wire rack. Serve with whipped cream. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Cake is best served cold.

watermelon-basil-salad.name: Watermelon Basil Salad
instructions: Stack basil leaves on top of each other and roll tightly into a log. Slice lengthwise into thin ribbons.
Combine basil slices and watermelon in a large bowl. Drizzle lemon juice over watermelon.
Mix salt and chili powder together; sprinkle over watermelon and toss to combine. Chill salad before serving, at least 30 minutes.

watermelon-sherbet.name: Watermelon Sherbet
instructions: Combine the watermelon, sugar, lemon juice, and salt in a large mixing bowl; stir to coat evenly. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerator for 30 minutes.
Blend the mixture in a blender until smooth; return to the bowl.

Pour the cold water into a saucepan. Sprinkle the gelatin over the cold water; let stand 1 minutes. Place the saucepan over low heat; cook for 2 minutes. Stir the gelatin mixture into the blended watermelon mixture. Add the heavy cream; beat with an electric hand mixer at medium speed until the mixture is fluffy.

Transfer the mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer's directions until it reaches 'soft-serve' consistency. Transfer ice cream to a one- or two-quart lidded plastic container; cover surface with plastic wrap and seal. For best results, ice cream should ripen in the freezer for at least 2 hours or overnight.

watermelon-soup.name: Watermelon Soup
instructions: Blend watermelon, lemon juice, mint, and honey in a blender until smooth.
Refrigerate for 2 hours; serve chilled.

whiskey-ginger-cocktail.name: Whiskey Ginger Cocktail
instructions: Fill a tall cocktail glass with ice.
Stir in whiskey and ginger ale.

white-beans-and-charred-broccoli-with-pa.name: White Beans And Charred Broccoli With Parmesan

ingredients.item: Dried large white beans (such as gigante or corona)

instructions: Drain beans and place in a large heavy pot. Remove rind from Parmesan and add rind along with onion and garlic to beans. Pour in water to cover by 2”; season with salt. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, adding water as needed to keep beans submerged, until beans are tender, about 2 hours. Let cool. Discard vegetables and Parmesan rind, then drain.
Preheat oven to 450°. Toss broccoli with ¼ cup oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper. Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and lightly charred, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.

Finely chop half of broccoli and toss in a large bowl with anchovies, lemon zest, lemon juice, and beans. Shave half of Parmesan over and add remaining broccoli and ¼ cup oil; toss and season with salt, pepper, and more lemon juice, if desired. Shave remaining Parmesan over.
DO AHEAD: Beans can be cooked 5 days ahead; cover and chill in cooking liquid. Warm before serving. Broccoli can be roasted 6 hours ahead; store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

white-mushrooms-in-the-oven-with-potatoe.name: White Mushrooms In The Oven With Potatoes
white-mushrooms-in-the-oven-with-potatoe.original_name: Λευκά μανιτάρια στο φούρνο με πατάτες
instructions: Preheat the evening to 200°C, to resist.
Add the dried mushrooms in a bowl and add the hot water. Cover the bowl and set aside.
Clean the potatoes and cut them into thin slices of 3 mm. Clean the fresh mushrooms and cut them into thick slices 1/2 cm thick.
Lightly grease a shallow baking pan and make a layer of onion slices.
Cover with a layer of potatoes. Continue with a layer of fresh mushrooms.
Sprinkle with thin onion slices, some garlic, salt, pepper and some parsley.
Repeat the potato-mush-onion-score and parsley layers, sprinkled in between salt and freshly ground pepper.
Add the soaked dried mushrooms (keep their water) and thyme and sprinkle with the wine.
Pour the olive oil over the whole surface of the food. Pour from the edge of the vessel the warm water where the mushrooms are soaked.
Transfer the baking pan to the bottom grill of the preheated oven and bake for about an hour, until the surface turns brown and the potato melts.
If we find during baking that the baking pan has dried, we fill in a little hot water, which we always throw at the edge of the vessel (not on the surface of the food).

winter-apple-compote-recipe-lezzet.name: Winter Apple Compote Recipe

ingredients.item: Juice of half lemon (in the decision of making for pretreatment)

instructions: 1. Wash the apples well, so you can put the shells or leave it with shell.
2. Then chop apple slices into cube or ring.
3. Decide your apples by putting them into lemon juice front.
4. Put water and sugar into the pot, heat it by stirring in medium fire until sugar melt.
5. After sugar is melted, add lemon juice, cinubling and carvings.
6. Add apple slices to the pot and leave the compression.
7. After boiling, cook in jealous fire for 10-15 minutes.
8. Apples should be soft but not dispersed.
9. Take from January to cool at room temperature.
10. Then you can make cold service by removing the refrigerator.
11.  Afiyet olsun.
